About

Designing Spaces That Transcend the Ordinary

A highly-skilled, licensed architect with over four decades shaping architecture and interior design across India, Sri Lanka, UAE, and China. Alumnus of Anna University, Chennai — bringing classical training, international exposure, and Contemporary Vaastu expertise to every project.
